top_signals.title: Deutsche Bank Raid Casts Cloud Over Record Profit
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank AG closed out a record year for profit with higher trading income and a new share buyback, a boost to Chief Executive Officer Christian Sewing a day after a raid of its Frankfurt offices raked up memories of the lender’s past troubles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: StraightPath Founders Get Prison for $386 Million Pre-IPO Fraud
top_signals.summary: The founders of StraightPath Venture Partners LLC were sentenced to years in prison for defrauding investors who gave them $386 million to supposedly invest cheaply in hot companies about to go public.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
